last_verdict.note: Logic suite green on the desktop (i9-13980HX). +10 vs the start-of-session count from new FIFO/_audio_cb tests + barge-in confirmation tests landed this session. 2 pre-existing numpy divide-by-zero RuntimeWarnings in core/endpointing.py (mel filter), not failures. Whole-tree import smoke also PASS (120 modules).

next: DONE this session (two landings on main): (1) 554b300 -- recovered the PC-interrupted playback rewrite: TTS flows through a callback-driven OutputStream + bounded PlaybackFIFO so the AEC far-end reference is teed from the audio callback at the TRUE playback position (far->near lag now inside DTLN's +/-60ms); barge-in/shutdown flush the FIFO. Adversarial-reviewed (6 minor, 0 blockers); abort/flush contract documented (a true rollback is unsound under concurrent flush/drain), direct _audio_cb tests, pinned notify wake-path. (2) 088e055 -- the interrupt is now 'a bit slower, higher confidence': EchoCoherenceDetector requires coherence_confirm_frames (default 2) CONSECUTIVE over-threshold frames before firing, so a one-off nonlinear-echo spike can't self-interrupt; identity-free (speaker-ID untouched, stays a separate feature). NEXT (P1, needs the mic): AEC on-hardware -- enable aec in config.local.json, calibrate aec_ref_delay_ms + measure post-AEC ERLE with tools/echo_probe.py now that the far-end ref is aligned; live-tune coherence_confirm_frames (2 vs 3) on a real talk-over; then Smart Turn v3 live floor A/B. Latent real-time item in backlog: move coherence note_playback off the audio callback (lock-free SPSC) before raising coherence_ring_ms. See .agents/backlog.md.
